name: threemf-volumetric-import
description: Bug 0035 regression guard — load a 3MF Volumetric file (csg-difference fixture, served from Studio public/) via __canaryLoadThreeMFFromUrl and verify it RENDERS: the historical failure was tape-ALU-then-fade-to-black (dropped C2 dirty signal at pipeline-ready + bug-0045 tape clobber). The load command throws loudly on importer failure; the checkpoint catches silent-black regressions. First run records the baseline candidate; approve after visual review.

commands: window.__canaryLoadThreeMFFromUrl('/test-csg-difference.3mf').then(r => { if (!r || !r.atoms) throw new Error('3MF load returned no atoms: ' + JSON.stringify(r)); return JSON.stringify(r); })
